name: Nakuru Akizuki
description: Ruby Moon is one of two magical guardians created by Eriol Hiiragizawa. The counterpart to the original guardian Yue, Ruby Moon is genderless but prefers to act like a female. When Eriol transfers to Tomoeda Elementary, Ruby Moon creates a false form named Nakuru Akizuki and enrolls in Seijou High School, entering the same class as Toya Kinomoto. ~!She claims she wants to consume Toya's energy herself, though it is never stated that she actually requires it nor why she couldn't simply steal it.

name: Natsuki Kuga
description: __Height:__ 160 cm __Child:__ Duran Natsuki is typically portrayed as a serious, rational blue-haired female, as a foil to the lighthearted Mai Tokiha. Natsuki's beauty is the target of several jokes, usually involving her becoming embarrassed in a situation. She usually has Shizuru Fujino as a close friend. Natsuki always uses some type of gun as her weapon and she is usually associated with wolves, silver and the element ice. She also has a habit of flicking her hair with her right hand. Runni

name: Obsidian
description: __Hardness:__ 5 A gem in charge of weapon production. Energetic and bubbly, Obsidian is very dedicated to their job and will make others weapons without hesitation if requested to.

name: Orphia
description: A High Elf from the Spirit Folk Village.

name: Rika Saionji
description: She is the seventh witch. ~!Rika has the ability called "Amnesia". That ability can make a person lose all memories of the witches. This ability is activated without having Rika kiss that person but instead activates by having her placing both of her hands on the target for several seconds, however, the effect takes 24 hours to manifest. However, on a Witch Killer, it erases the memories of those who met the target aside from the Seventh Witch, other Witch Killers, and Spotters, and also because

name: Rouge Portgas
nativeName: ポートガス・D・ルージュ
description: Portgas D. Rouge was Ace's mother. ~!She was also Gol D. Roger's wife (or at least lover) and the first female to have the initial D to appear. She was pregnant with Ace before Roger died, and fled to Baterilla in South Blue. There she held her pregnancy for 20 months through some unknown method (speculated by Marine Fleet Admiral Sengoku to be sheer willpower) in order to deceive the world of Ace's connection to the Pirate King. name: Shingo Shouji
description: Shingo Shoji is a member of the Night Kids who drives a red Honda Civic SiR-II (EG-6). Shingo races dangerously—he will nudge his rival's car in order to make the other driver lose control. He doesn't find plain downhill races any fun, preferring to race under a mutual handicap he calls the Duct Tape Death Match. He detests Takeshi Nakazato because he believes that he is unfit to be leader of the Night Kids, a position that Shingo openly covets. In terms of racing ability, Shingo is the se

name: Shinnosuke Kobayakawa
description: Another student from Japan, a talented sculptor who befriends and lives across the street from Lili and Dorothy during their time in London.

name: Shinobu Ijuuin
description: His father had an affair with a German princess and what came from that union was the handsome Shinobu who resembled his mother. His parents were separated due to unequal birth and his mother was married off to someone else. His father could not stand the sight of his son who looked eerily like his lover and spent his years away from Japan until he died. As a result Shinobu spent his time with his grandparents whom he loved dearly, which explained why he was willing to marry Benio. He's a romant

name: Spanner
description: __Height:__ 184 cm Spanner is British and was raised in Italy by his grandfather, who was a mechanic. He's a technophile and loves Japan because of its advancements in robotics. Spanner is an engineer in the Millefiore's Tech Department at the Merone Base and is a B-Ranked officer of the Black Spell. ~!He's interested in the power of the Vongola, to the point where he doesn't mind betraying his own Famiglia to help Tsuna complete the X-Burner.!~

name: Su
description: She is the mysterious being of light responsible for turning [Kyouko Jinguu](https://anilist.co/character/133102/Kyouko-Jinguu) into a magical girl, and taking all of the Mana Crystals from the Dark Realm. ~!Later, it is revealed that she sent Kyouko to attack the Dark Realm in order to get attention from [Maou](https://anilist.co/character/157951), her reclusive older sister.!~

name: Yuu Fujikura
description: A maid of the Arima household who sometimes councils Teppei. She had been in an orphanage from a very tender age until Isshin Arima took her in his care and brought her up to be an admirable maid. She has sworn to serve the Arima family to show her gratitude. She feels being privileged to be assigned as the maid-in-charge to serve Teppei, the next heir to the Arima Group.
